medications.name: Metformin
medications.instructions: Take 1 tablet by mouth twice daily with meals

medications.name: Insulin glargine
medications.instructions: Inject 10 units under the skin every night

medications.name: Glucose meter supplies
medications.instructions: Check glucose before breakfast and before dinner

medications.name: Sugary drinks
medications.instructions: Do not use soda or juice except for low glucose treatment

follow_up: Primary care appointment within 3 days for insulin adjustment.
Diabetes educator referral placed; call if not contacted within 1 week.
return_precautions: Return to the emergency department for glucose above 400 mg/dL that does not improve, repeated vomiting, confusion, severe weakness, trouble breathing, or signs of low blood sugar that do not improve after treatment.
risk_notes: High risk: new insulin start and needs early follow-up.
